messages.msg_04: Enter a whole number greater than 0
messages.msg_07: You cannot undo more than you did.

install.consent: By downloading the app, you confirm that you are of legal drinking age. You also give your consent to be addressed in creative ways, including, but not limited to, "lazy butt", "miserable loser", and so on, which is done not to harm you, but to make the BeerBank experience more enjoyable (not necessarily for you).
install.accepted_body: Open BeerBank from your home screen.
install.dismissed: You cancelled the installation - no problem, install it later from your browser menu (or look for the download icon in the address bar).
install.unsupported_body: To download BeerBank, please open this page in Android Chrome (not Incognito) or Safari on iPhone — then follow the install prompt.
install.unsupported_hint: Or maybe you already installed it? If so, open the app on your device.

settings.title: Settings
settings.conversion_description: We don't know your local currency, so set your own rate based on your local beer prices and how lazy you feel.

profile.title: Profile
profile.placeholder: We'll add log in / log out features here later. Meanwhile, your personal profile is - the most talented person in the room (just don't tell anyone).

help.title: How to use BeerBank
help.intro: Gamify your fitness: no hard workouts, just do random exercises and exchange them for beer!
help.text_1: When you have a moment, do a few push-ups or squats, whatever works. Even 3 or 5 will do.
help.text_2: On the main screen, enter the number of exercises and tap *Add*. Your Beer Credit will grow.
help.h_3: 3. When you buy a beer, write off the money you spent
help.text_3: Not enough credit? Skip that beer! Next time, do more push-ups beforehand, you lazy butt!
help.h_4: 4. Don't forget to set your conversion rate in Settings
help.text_4: Beer in my country costs 400 dinars. I'm a superhero — and want to do 100 push-ups for every beer I buy. I set the conversion rate to 4. Now, for every push-up, my Beer Credit increases by 4.
